title: Introduction to Operating Systems Placements Course 2022

segments.text: Hello ji , how are you all? this is Love Babbar
And welcome to the channel Code help, this is the introduction video of our upcoming
OS series , operating series , in this what we are going to cover
What expectations are getting full filled , are we going to target placements only or academics , gate etc
So our guru ji is with us , hello ji , how are you all?
This is Lakshay, today we have come to discuss with you , the course
Today you will get the first video of the course , but before that we should give you the introduction
Regarding the course , so Babbar bhaiya will ask questions to me , and I will answer it
I am a student , and I came to know that a OS series is going to start at Code help, 1st tell me what topics we are going to cover in this
The OS which you study in college , it will be little different from that
In college you are studying the whole academic thing , you have to give exams
But here our point of view is different , we want to give you placements specific things
Only placement specific things , it is not going to help you in clearing any exam
It can help in college exam a little bit , in gate you are not going to get 100/100, because we are not targeting it
We are only targeting placement interview , if there 10 questions has been asked , then we are making sure that you know all the answers
If OS is going to be a deciding factor , we will make it very strong , so that you can answer all the question and make the interviewer happy
Lets tell which topics we are going to cover , students should know that
1st of all, what is OS ? we will discuss it , why it is important and why not
Why we need to study that , other then this the topics you have studied , we will cover all
Like process , memory management ,scheduling algorithms, storage management , concurrency control
Which you all study in college , but we will study it with a little different angle
Till now whatever video I have seen , there are many good videos regarding this but non is placement orientated , are academics oriented
They have explained theory at a good level , but that's only theory, there is no practical
There is no placement specific course on Youtube , in India in hindi
There are theory related ,academics related but if I have to tell students that how our course is different than those courses
Better than those courses ,then what are the factors
1.It is targeting only placements, 2. We will discuss the questions which are being asked directly in interviews
What answer you have to give , what are the knowledge required
Interviewer will ask you some questions , like what is OS?
You will tell the definition only , it will not impress the interviewer ,
He wants to know , whether you have the understanding por not
In same way we will explain you considering the background , so that you can answer properly
2nd we will introduce some questions which we implement, we will take it to the implementation level
The interviewer will not ask you to code it , but he wants you to write little bit , how to write concurrency control questions
So in this way we will keep it practical , students will enjoy it
All the courses , theory part is excellent , we have also studied from there in our college time to pass
But from the placement point of view , if you implemented it, let me write a program
You will standout from the rest , this boy knows everything , his or her OS part is very strong
If that company is Adobe then its great!!
This video is sponsored by Crio.Do , the worlds leading project driven platform
If we are targeting a good job , problem solving skill , DSA we are doing here, if we want to master development , then Crio is the place for you
In crio you will get different programs . like Full stack development , Backend development program
Program's grade is of the internship level
Here you are going to do things practically
After each program you will have enough projects . Your resume will become very impressive
There is a fellowship program , in which placement is ensured
That you will be placed in a product based company
All programs comes with 1 week free trail
And you will get assured scholarship
A link is being showed in the description , from there you can get the maximum discount available .You can see a coupon code here
You can use it to get maximum discount , it is applicable to every program . Thank you
Many OS related questions were asked . At least we are targeting concurrency control implementation
Elit world premium questions will be also there , we will have fun
So we have understood this , if you have to give one message to your students that take care of this thing , then what is it?
I will say that OS videos will come from today , you have to be just consistent
Which ever day the video comes, try to watch it , that day if possible
We will teach you from the basic , try to watch it that day only, be consistent , try to watch it that day only
Give us the feedback , comment. What will happen from this , if you left it for a while , than it will get piled up
Then you will not enjoy it , the interaction that is required will not come
Which ever day the video comes, try to watch it , that day only
If you left some videos , then your brain will tell you to leave it, you will feel lazy
Which ever day the video comes, try to watch it , that day only, comment " Bhaiya maza aa gya " , or Bhaiya you can improve this
Lets talk about the frequency , we will try to upload two videos minimum in a week , it will be long , well explained
You will have fun , we will try that you don't feel boring , may be we will keep it small
At least two videos will come , it can be more , now we can commit for two videos
When it will end , we will see those things later, 1st see 2 , 3 videos , tell what improvement we can do, dates will also come
Anything else or we should say bye bye ?
Wait , 1st video will be uploaded today ,tell me in the comment section , what else we should keep in mind
That's it for this video, we will meet in the next video, Bye bye!!
